headline: Domino's free pizza giveaway tied to World Cup red card
summary: Fans who register before June 10 could win 1 of more than 60,000 free medium pizzas if a U.S. player is sent off

raw.headline: Domino's free pizza giveaway tied to World Cup red card

headline: Warren Buffett’s Berkshire Hathaway Dumped 16 Stocks in Q1, But the Chevron Sale Was the Largest
summary: Berkshire exited 16 stocks in Q1 under CEO Greg Abel, but its Chevron stock sale stood apart. Despite trimming its stake, Berkshire still appears deeply committed to the energy giant.

raw.headline: Warren Buffett’s Berkshire Hathaway Dumped 16 Stocks in Q1, But the Chevron Sale Was the Largest
raw.summary: Berkshire exited 16 stocks in Q1 under CEO Greg Abel, but its Chevron stock sale stood apart. Despite trimming its stake, Berkshire still appears deeply committed to the energy giant.

headline: Domino's (DPZ): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q1 Earnings?
summary: Domino's has gotten torched over the last six months - since November 2025, its stock price has dropped 24.6% to $305.10 per share. This was partly due to its softer quarterly results and may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.

headline: Warren Buffett's Berkshire dumps entire stake in iconic pizza brand
summary: It was supposed to be a long-term bet on pizza. For six straight quarters, Berkshire Hathaway kept buying Domino's Pizza shares. The position built into a near-10% stake in the iconic pizza chain, a level of institutional conviction that made investors sit up and pay attention. Then, in a single ...
